title: Nutty Chinese Noodles
description: A creamy and nutty Chinese dish featuring pappardelle pasta that is dairy-free-friendly, perfect for a comforting dinner.

ingredients.name: 3 tbsp Nutritional Yeast Flakes
ingredients.notes: For extra nuttiness and cheesy flavor

ingredients.name: 3 cups vegetable broth
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's unsalted or use low sodium variety

ingredients.name: 1 can (14 oz) chickpeas, drained and rinsed
1 cup cashews, soaked overnight and drained
2 tbsp soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Guaranteed to enhance the flavors of the dish

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse cashews under cold water. Pat them dry with a paper towel.
In a large skillet, heat sesame oil over medium heat. Add finely chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and continue cooking for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Pour in the vegetable broth and coconut milk. Bring to a simmer then stir in nutritional yeast flakes and soy sauce.
Gently toss the pappardelle pasta with the vegan butter (make sure it's not overheated or raw) until coated evenly. Add this mixture into your pan.
Fold in soaked cashews, chickpeas, and continue cooking for another 10 minutes until everything is heated through and the sauce has thickened slightly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Stir well to ensure spices are distributed evenly.
Transfer the creamy noodle dish into a serving dish and serve hot.
